semantics: An estate is a reviewed source-and-rights collection boundary, not an inferred keyword bucket. Registration records the source model and next gate; it does not claim completeness or authorize activation.

discovery.inventory_unit: production string requiring human estate mapping

estates.label: Star Trek
estates.source_model: character-category pages with exact performer fields
estates.next_gate: Complete the Star Trek gold shard and operating-reliability receipts while preserving zero media debt between cycles.

estates.label: Doctor Who
estates.source_model: selected character categories with compact infobox performer fields
estates.next_gate: Review the regenerated corpus semantically and add adapter-specific fixtures before certification.

estates.label: Star Wars
estates.next_gate: Prove portrayal-category identity and exact source receipts with an adapter-specific fixture.

estates.label: Muppets & Henson
estates.source_model: character categories with performer fields and character-as-performer demotion
estates.next_gate: Review the regenerated corpus for non-human performer leakage and certify the demotion rules.

estates.label: Power Rangers
estates.source_model: Ranger and villain character categories with performer fields
estates.next_gate: Regenerate under the current parser, review exact roles, preserve revisions, and certify.

estates.label: Kaiju
estates.source_model: performer categories that currently identify people but not exact roles
estates.next_gate: Convert performer-only membership into exact performer-role observations or retain it as a lead source only.

estates.label: Tokusatsu
estates.source_model: cross-production performer categories that do not yet prove exact roles
estates.next_gate: Design and fixture an exact role-bearing adapter before any certification.

estates.label: Babylon 5
estates.source_model: existing canonical shelf and character-wiki retrieval mapping; no census adapter yet
estates.next_gate: Inventory source categories and choose an exact performer-role extraction model.

estates.label: Farscape
estates.source_model: existing canonical shelf and character-wiki retrieval mapping; no census adapter yet
estates.next_gate: Inventory source categories and choose an exact performer-role extraction model.
